name: Hamburger Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and remove grease.
2. Add the tomato sauce, salt, and garlic powder to the browned meat. Set aside.
3. Place the crescent rolls in a 9-inch pie pan to form the crust.
4. Spread 1 cup of the combined cheeses (mozzarella and cheddar) evenly on the bottom of the crust.
5. Pour the meat mixture into the crust, spreading it out evenly.
6. Top with the remaining 1 cup of combined cheeses.
7. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
